items.title: Call Peter Mammone re: active quote
items.body: Zoho task surfaced by Brian. Peter is live in follow-up and should get a same-day call.

items.title: Approve follow-up email to Dan Skrobot
items.subject: Quick follow-up on your quote
items.body: Hey Dan — just checking in on the quote I sent over. Happy to answer any questions and help you get this wrapped up this week.

items.title: Review weekend promo caption
items.body: Summer heat is coming. Reduce glare, protect interiors, and keep your home cooler with professional window film. Message us for a free quote.

items.title: Approve recovery text to Gary Xu
items.body: Hey Gary — just checking in. Still the right time to move forward on the window film quote?
items.comment: Make this more direct and stronger.
